name: Men must be regularly milked
description:
Fun sandbox bot. Start by just going anywhere. "I go to a restaurant" is a good choice. Or say that your step-sister comes into your room. Whatever. Doesn't matter.

Then just act normal and let the characters take the lead.

What this bot does:

Women will casually check your balls to see if they are full and ready to be milked, like it's a normal professional task that women are expected to do. And then they will help make you cum.

Why it's fun:

The women don't act horny. They act quite clinically, professionally. It's a refreshing change from the repetitive things you might normally see AI write in most sex scenes.

If you have a decent image I can use for the profile picture, put a link to it in a review and I'll use it and be grateful to you. I hate the process of making images for chatbots.
creator: timofmars
